change: Redesigned Simulate_PlayerProgression as a dry-run validator to avoid SCAR C++ API calls while validating civ resolution and profile chain.
Visual refactor of Difficulty_Config: restored column alignment (~40-45 chars), added section headers, simplified Difficulty_Init(), preserved TIER_DEFAULTS + _MergeTier() architecture
notes: AI-driven cleanup; maintains single baseline (TIER_DEFAULTS) pattern per user requirement

change: Semantic refactor of Restriction_Profile: renamed unlocked→available profiles (siege_available, engineers_available, workshop_available), flipped template booleans (true=restricted, false=available), added Validator_RestrictionState()
notes: Resolved confusing name-value inversion; profile names now match boolean semantics

change: Updated ApplyRestrictionProfile() call to use workshop_available (renamed from workshop_unlocked) in Phase 2 completion handler
notes: Consistency update following restriction profile semantic refactor

change: Added condensed objectives UI override and disabled annihilation defeat conditions in Mission_Start() for co-op stability

Added AI takeover prevention (Reset_AI, Reset_AI_OnTakeOver) and player disconnect transfer system (CheckPlayerDisconnects, FindRecipientPlayer, TransferResources, TransferUnits, TransferBuildings) with g_transferred_slots double-transfer guard
notes: Phase 2 of Arabia implementation plan — 7 new functions, 4 new globals, +124 lines

change: Created centralized difficulty config file with TIER_DEFAULTS (18 fields), _MergeTier overlay, Difficulty_Config (4 tiers), GetAIDifficulty(), Difficulty_Init()
notes: 219 lines. Japan pattern. Replaces inline AI_Difficulty checks with DC.* config fields

change: Created spawn/reinforcement file with Deploy_*_CivAware helpers, Start_Setup, Reinforcements (Player1/Player2/Trader/Siege), SGroup_Tracker, Patrol_Cycle, Units_Deploy
notes: 198 lines. CIV maps + ResolveCivMapKey for DLC-safe deployment

change: Refactored main orchestrator: added imports for difficulty.scar and spawns.scar, added Difficulty_Init() call, converted Mission_SetRestrictions to DC.* fields, removed extracted functions
notes: 927 to 741 lines (-186). Functions moved to difficulty.scar and spawns.scar

change: Converted all 18 AI_Difficulty numeric checks to DC.* config fields across SeizeCity, Main_Waves, CaptureMine, DestroyCheckpoint functions
notes: 597 to 540 lines (-57). Zero remaining AI_Difficulty refs outside difficulty.scar
